NYCT Department of Buses (DOB)

payload.title: MTA Deputy Chief Procurement Officer – Procurement Operations

payload.description: MTA Procurement Department
Vendor providing prognostic maintenance services for NYCT Department of Buses and MTA Bus Company

Modification to the sole-source miscellaneous service contract awarded to Preteckt, Inc. to perform prognostic maintenance services for NYCT Department of Buses and MTA Bus Company to increase the quantity of buses monitored from 1,528 to 5,000; extend the term by one year (December 1, 2023–November 30, 2024); and add an estimated $3.3 million for expected expenditures.

tool_args.label: Prognostic Maintenance Services for NYCT DOB and MTA Bus Company

payload.description: Artificially intelligent prognostic maintenance service that analyzes raw sensor data collected from bus exhaust aftertreatment subsystems by existing bus telematics systems to provide prognostic maintenance alerts and repair plans designed to reduce in-service interruptions

payload.description: Board meeting for procurement action approval
Competitive Request for Proposal for monitoring of this and additional bus systems to be advertised
Two-year no charge proof-of-concept pilot resulting from 2019 Transit Tech Lab efforts

payload.claim_text: The Preteckt system is designed to analyze raw sensor data collected from the exhaust aftertreatment subsystem by the existing bus telematics system to provide prognostic maintenance alerts and repair plans which can be used to reduce in-service interruptions.
payload.description: Description of Preteckt system function

tool_args.label: Preteckt system success at NYC Transit

payload.claim_text: Since its initial deployment at NYC Transit, this system has successfully helped to both identify potential road calls before they occur and optimize labor hours and material costs.
payload.description: Claim of successful outcomes from Preteckt system deployment at NYC Transit

payload.claim_text: The final pricing for this modification has been reviewed by the Cost-Price Analysis Unit and found to be fair and reasonable.
payload.description: Pricing review conclusion

tool_args.label: DOB and MTABC determination on maintenance strategy

payload.claim_text: DOB and MTABC have determined that the use of prognostic maintenance services to analyze data and create prognostic alerts and repair plans will be effective and beneficial to the overall bus maintenance strategy.
payload.description: Agency determination on effectiveness of prognostic maintenance services

payload.claim_text: Eight companies responded to a Request for Information advertised by Procurement in early 2023.
payload.description: Market response to RFI for prognostic maintenance services
